title: (Senior) CRM-Manager*in (all genders)
matched_skills: Data-driven decision making / KPI analysis (Power BI, Looker Studio)
Campaign management (partial — Moli Media e-commerce live-stream campaigns)
E-commerce sector exposure (Moli Media live-stream agency)
missing_skills: German C1 (CV shows B1+ — below required level)
core_responsibilities: Plan, manage, and optimize CRM and email marketing campaigns across all relevant channels
Analyze campaign and customer data, run A/B tests, and derive data-based optimization measures to improve engagement, conversion, and revenue
Develop, implement, and optimize automated customer journeys with focus on reactivation and activation
Design and manage loyalty and retention initiatives to drive repeat purchases and long-term customer loyalty
Segment target audiences and translate customer insights into personalized, relevant communication
recommended_emphasis: Highlight any CRM or email marketing tool experience, even if limited — Klaviyo proficiency is the single most critical gap to address
Reframe Moli Media role to emphasize customer engagement, campaign performance, and audience segmentation in an e-commerce context
Emphasize data analysis and KPI reporting capabilities (Power BI, Looker Studio) as foundations for data-driven CRM optimization
Demonstrate understanding of customer lifecycle stages and retention logic if any experience exists, even indirectly
Address German language level honestly — B1+ is below C1 requirement; this is a near-disqualifying gap for a Hamburg-based role

company_info.size_raw: No explicit employee count found in JD; only '5 Jobs' listed on platform and '1,000,000+ products sold' mentioned
